System.Uptime: import subprocess; print(subprocess.check_output('systeminfo | findstr /C:"System Boot Time"', shell=True).decode())
System.Disk Space: import shutil; total, used, free = shutil.disk_usage('/'); print(f'Total: {total//1e9:.1f}GB | Used: {used//1e9:.1f}GB | Free: {free//1e9:.1f}GB')

Files.List Documents: from pathlib import Path; files = list(Path.home().glob('Documents/*')); print(f'Files: {len(files)}')
Files.Delete Temp: import shutil; shutil.rmtree(r'C:\Windows\Temp', ignore_errors=True); print('Temp cleared')
Files.Find Large Files: from pathlib import Path; files = sorted(Path.home().glob('**/*'), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_size if p.is_file() else 0, reverse=True)[:5]; print('\n'.join(f'{f.name}: {f.stat().st_size/1e6:.1f}MB' for f in files))

Control.Close All: import os; os.system('taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe'); print('Closed Chrome')

Network.WiFi Status: import subprocess; print(subprocess.check_output('netsh wlan show interfaces', shell=True).decode()[:300])
